summary: Iran warned the United States that an Israeli strike on Beirut would jeopardize diplomatic efforts to end the war (Source: @asafroz/49503). The United States reported that Iran attempted to attack American forces and conducted defensive strikes in southern Iran (Source: @naya_foriraq/76101, @naya_foriraq/76099). Hezbollah launched an Ababil drone attack on the Israeli 300th Brigade command building while the IDF responded by striking Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon (Source: @presstv/191385, @idf_telegram/23856).
key_points: Iran warned Washington that any Israeli strike on Beirut would severely damage war‑ending diplomatic contacts (Source: @asafroz/49503).
Iran activated air‑defence systems in Indemeshk, Isfahan, Qom and Babolsar (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/361286).
U.S. officials said Iran attempted to attack American forces over the past 24 hours (Source: @naya_foriraq/76101).
The United States carried out defensive strikes in southern Iran on Monday (Source: @naya_foriraq/76099).
Hezbollah used an Ababil drone to strike the Israeli 300th Brigade command building at Shomera barracks (Source: @presstv/191385).
The IDF announced attacks on Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon and other locations (Source: @idf_telegram/23856).
Multiple hostile aircraft intrusions were reported along Israel’s northern border at Shlomi, Rosh HaNikra, Betzet Beach and Shomera (Source: @tzevaadom_en/67468).

sections.executive_summary: Iran warned Washington that an Israeli strike on Beirut would jeopardize diplomatic progress (Source: @asafroz/49503). The United States reported Iranian attempts to attack U.S. forces and responded with defensive strikes in southern Iran (Source: @naya_foriraq/76101, @naya_foriraq/76099). Hezbollah’s drone attack on an Israeli brigade command building prompted IDF strikes on Hezbollah sites in southern Lebanon (Source: @presstv/191385, @idf_telegram/23856).

points: Iran’s official news agency reported explosions in Bandar Abbas, with circumstances still under investigation (Source: @asafroz/49501).
Iran activated air‑defence systems in four locations: Indemeshk, Isfahan, Qom and Babolsar (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/361286).
U.S. officials said Iran attempted to attack American forces over the previous 24 hours (Source: @naya_foriraq/76101).
The United States conducted defensive strikes in southern Iran on Monday (Source: @naya_foriraq/76099).
Iranian top negotiator Qalibaf and foreign minister Araqchi traveled to Doha for talks with Qatar’s prime minister about a possible U.S.–Iran deal (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3018).
Qatar‑mediated talks are reported to be close to producing a U.S.–Iran agreement on frozen Iranian assets (Source: @VahidOnline/75712).
PressTV announced that 32 international vessels, including five super‑tankers, safely crossed the Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours (Source: @presstv/191374).
The IDF announced it has begun striking Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon and other areas (Source: @idf_telegram/23856).
Multiple hostile aircraft intrusions were logged at Shlomi, Rosh HaNikra, Betzet Beach and Shomera, triggering red‑alert responses (Source: @tzevaadom_en/67468).
A bus station in the Shomera settlement was hit by a Hezbollah explosive drone; no casualties were reported (Source: @almogboker78/17122).
The Israeli defense ministry issued alerts for possible hostile aircraft intrusion in the Arava‑El Aramsha area (Source: @idf_telegram/23844).
Hezbollah claimed an Ababil drone targeted the Israeli 300th Brigade command building at Shomera barracks (Source: @presstv/191385).
Hezbollah released a statement claiming its fighters attacked an Israeli 300th Brigade command building at Shomera with an Ababil drone (Source: @presstv/191385).
The IDF reported ongoing strikes against Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon (Source: @idf_telegram/23856).
A Hezbollah‑affiliated post warned that Israeli attacks on Lebanese territory would be met with strong retaliation (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/361262).
PKPOI warned that the war in Lebanon will widen from tonight and intensify in the coming days (Source: @pkpoi/142203).
Qatar’s mediation is reported to have brought the United States and Iran close to an agreement on frozen Iranian assets (Source: @VahidOnline/75712).
Iranian negotiators Qalibaf and Araqchi met Qatar’s prime minister in Doha to discuss a potential U.S.–Iran deal (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3018).
China reiterated support for dialogue and stability in West Asia as Iran‑U.S. negotiations continue (Source: @presstv/191376).
U.S. officials indicated Iran attempted attacks on American forces, raising regional security concerns (Source: @naya_foriraq/76101).

key_developments: Iran warned Washington that any Israeli strike on Beirut would severely damage diplomatic contacts aimed at ending the war (Source: @asafroz/49503).
Iran activated air‑defence systems in Indemeshk, Isfahan, Qom and Babolsar (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/361286).
U.S. officials reported that Iran attempted to attack American forces over the past 24 hours (Source: @naya_foriraq/76101).
The United States carried out defensive strikes in southern Iran on Monday (Source: @naya_foriraq/76099).
Hezbollah used an Ababil drone to strike the Israeli 300th Brigade command building at Shomera barracks (Source: @presstv/191385).
The IDF announced attacks on Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon and other locations (Source: @idf_telegram/23856).
Multiple hostile aircraft intrusions were reported along Israel’s northern border at Shlomi, Rosh HaNikra, Betzet Beach and Shomera (Source: @tzevaadom_en/67468).
sections.threat_assessment: Iran’s activation of air‑defence assets and its reported attempts to strike U.S. forces indicate a heightened willingness to confront regional adversaries. Hezbollah’s drone strike on an Israeli brigade command post and the IDF’s retaliatory attacks suggest an escalating tit‑for‑tat cycle in southern Lebanon. Repeated hostile aircraft intrusions along Israel’s northern frontier raise the risk of broader aerial engagements, while U.S. defensive strikes in southern Iran demonstrate a willingness to counter Iranian aggression directly.
sections.regional_response: Qatar is actively mediating between the United States and Iran, with reports of a near‑term agreement on frozen Iranian assets. China’s public endorsement of dialogue underscores broader international interest in stabilising West Asia. Israel’s intensified strikes on Hezbollah infrastructure and heightened alert posture reflect a strategy of pre‑emptive pressure to deter further Lebanese attacks.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Iran’s air‑defence deployments in central and northern provinces should be prioritized to assess any escalation toward Israeli air operations. Continued surveillance of Hezbollah drone activity is essential, given recent successful strikes on Israeli command facilities. The pattern of hostile aircraft intrusions along Israel’s northern border warrants increased radar and quick‑reaction force readiness to prevent inadvertent escalation.
